title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is there some- thing under-neath the ground!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh my...I what are you staring at-?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did a giant emerge from the ground?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WHAT IS IT? YOU'RE STARTING AT ME...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Do you have a crush on ME*!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A false accused- tion out of nowhere!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And he's speaking like a polite middle-aged man!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: do... do giants live underground!? It's the first time that I've seen one.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is happening!? The ground is moving around like Clay!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't freak out!! He must be an ability user!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So... what do you want to do about this...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What do you mean by that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Captain!! There's two more of them over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, wait just a second, Morley!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I HAVE A NEW INVENTION THAT I'VE BEEN WAITING TO USE....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and instead of waiting, you went ahead and started fighting them first....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They're normally scattered around the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, you're still staring at me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stop making a fuss, you scum!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me try out my new weapon....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are the four commanders of the Revoli- Tionary Army gathered here in this town!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooooh, I must say... that these men are such violent creatures!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must be because they have a crush on you, potato giant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No way, you think so gross.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Betty. Can I go ahead and finish them off?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No one even answered the question!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what the hell is he mumbling about?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He got mad for some reason!!

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 60 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
